# Computer Tycoon

> A retro 1980s homecomputer business tycoon game playable in the browser. Design machines, manage R&D, marketing, and finances, and compete against AI rivals across the decade.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Start a new game, set up your company, and play the tycoon simulation.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create an account to save your game progress.
